name: DP-700
fullName: Implementing Data Engineering Solutions Using Microsoft Fabric
description: Free 25-question preview of the Examplar DP-700 (Microsoft Fabric Data Engineer Associate) practice pack. Original scenario questions written from official Microsoft Learn documentation, aligned to the DP-700 study guide (skills measured as of April 20, 2026). The full 280-question pack is available separately. Not real exam questions.

pro.title: DP-700 Complete
highlights: 280 original scenario questions across every DP-700 exam objective
Detailed explanation for the correct answer and every distractor
An official Microsoft Learn reference on every question
Study mode with spaced repetition and weak-area focus
